DESCRIPTION: Top-level site metadata block. One per report. ASSET = 'Site'.
Overall production unit metrics block. One per report. ASSET = 'Workcenter'.
Repeating belt conveyor assets (C1-C9+). ASSET = conveyor key e.g. 'C4'.
Repeating crusher assets (Crusher1, Crusher2+). ASSET = crusher key e.g. 'Crusher1'.
Top-level circuit nodes (Circuit.A, Circuit.B minimum). ASSET = e.g. 'Circuit.A'.
